summary: Iteration 2 testing completed successfully. Critical LLM chat integration bug has been FIXED. All backend APIs working (21/21 passed). Frontend UI fully functional with excellent chat functionality, wiki operations, and navigation. Minor UI selector issues identified but core functionality working perfectly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 422 status in console but chat still works
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Error handling in place, functionality not impacted

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button selector timeout in automated testing
Logout button selector not found in settings page

design_issues.issue: React DOM nesting warning: button inside button

✅ Chat session creation and management in sidebar
✅ Wiki page creation and editing operations
